name: ace-tool
description: Semantic codebase search, code indexing, and prompt enhancement via standalone CLI. Use when: (1) Semantic code search with natural language queries, (2) Code indexing for remote codebase retrieval, (3) Prompt enhancement with codebase context, (4) Before grep/find/glob operations for better accuracy, (5) Complex requirements clarification, (6) Large codebase navigation. Triggers: "search context", "enhance prompt", "find code that", "index project", "clarify requirements". IMPORTANT: Always ...
